nasb.text: This was the inheritance of the tribe of the sons of Naphtali according to their families, the cities with their villages.

esv.text: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Naphtali according to their clans—the cities with their villages.

cnv.text: 這些城和屬於這些城的村莊，就是拿弗他利支派按著家族所得的產業。

ccb.text: 这些城邑和乡村都是拿弗他利支派按宗族分到的产业。
